Romanization

If they try to steal my shine

'Cause ain't nobody stoppin'
what we got now (Got now!)
Yeah, we got the game,
got it locked down (Locked down!)
It's diamonds in they face,
and we rock out (Rock out!)
Money on the way
We forgot about the days
when we had to go and chase
what we got now (We got it now!)
And if they wanna hate, just let 'em hate,
you know it's all the same
From Stockton down to Shin-Nonhyeon,
I promise they gon' know the name
We built it from the solid ground
It's VVS, we're here to stay

what we got now (Got now!)

and we rock out (Rock out!)

when we had to go and chase
what we got now (We got it now!)

you know it's all the same
From Stockton down to Shin-Nonhyeon,
I promise they gon' know the name
We built it from the solid ground
It's VVS, we're here to stay
